channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI pioneers win Nobel Prize in physics
item.description: Two pioneers of artificial intelligence — John Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton — won the Nobel Prize in physics Tuesday for helping create the building blocks of machine learning that is revolutionizing the way we work and live but also creates new threats for humanity.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Why 14 state attorneys general are suing TikTok
item.description: Fourteen attorneys general sued TikTok on Tuesday, alleging that the company created an intentionally addictive app that harmed young people and misrepresented the effectiveness of its safety tools.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok Faces Legal Backlash Over Addiction Concerns - Lawsuits Filed by Dozen States
item.description: TikTok faces lawsuits from over a dozen states and DC over concerns of addiction and harm to children's mental health
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 4 ways your Android phone's Play Store could change soon, if Google loses Epic appeal
item.description: Google lost its legal fight, here's 4 ways your Android phone's Play Store could change soon, if Google loses Epic appeal.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: The genAI opportunity: From ‘data to insight’ to ‘context to action’
item.description: By Bryan Kirschner, Vice President, Strategy at DataStax Data scientists have long struggled with silos and cycle time.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A close call with crafty scammer posing as Microsoft support
item.description: This scam uses Google search results to redirect you to scammers instead of Microsoft support. Here's what tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson has to say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Largest US water utility hit by cyberattack
item.description: The largest water and wastewater utility company in the U.S. was hit by a cyberattack, forcing it to temporarily pause billing for its customers, the company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Trump says migrants who have committed murder have introduced 'a lot of bad genes in our country'
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump on Monday suggested that migrants who are in the U_S_ and have committed murder did so because “it’s in their genes.”.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Previews: What’s in the latest build?
item.description: The Windows 11 2023 Update has been released, but behind the scenes, Microsoft is constantly working to improve the newest version of Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Advocacy groups suspend use of 'suicide capsule' pending Swiss criminal probe of woman's death
item.description: Advocacy groups behind a so-called suicide capsule said Sunday they have suspended the process of taking applications to use it — which numbered over 370 last month — as a criminal investigation into its first use in Switzerland is completed.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AirPods 4 vs Pro 2: Is the newer model worth it?
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson compares the AirPods 4 and the AirPods Pro 2. "For me, audio quality is the most essential factor in buying new headphones or earbuds," Kurt says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: VP Harris Gets Boost from Tech Leaders at Fundraiser Hosted by Y Combinator CEO
item.description: Tech executives, including Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan, are hosting a fundraiser for Vice President Kamala Harris in San Francisco, with former Speaker Nancy Pelosi set to headline the event.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation
item.description: Cybersecurity experts from the Army Software Factory, SSA and USCIS say letting developers drive security efforts drives up safety in code. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange: Army, SSA and USCIS cyber chiefs on securing software through automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: NSA’s Kristina Walter on exposing ‘sophisticated’ cyber adversaries
item.description: The Cybersecurity Collaboration Center director pursues whole-of-government approach to helping agencies and industry tackle global cyberthreats. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2024: NSA’s Kristina Walter on exposing ‘sophisticated’ cyber adversaries first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Google says it will stop linking to New Zealand news if a law passes forcing it to pay for content
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Google said Friday it will stop linking to New Zealand news content and will reverse its support of local media outlets if the government passes a law forcing tech companies to pay for articles displayed on their platforms.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4
